title: Probation Review
subtitle: Evaluate probationary employees against criteria and decide outcomes

empty.title: No guidelines for {{year}} yet
empty.description: HR has not published any evaluation guidelines for this year.

error.title: Could not load guidelines
error.description: Something went wrong while loading. Please try again.

form.description: Guidelines help managers understand how to evaluate probation for the applicable year.
form.title: Title
form.orderInvalid: Order must be a non-negative integer
form.contentPlaceholder: Write the guideline content… Line breaks are preserved. For a table, write ≥2 consecutive lines like: Col A | Col B | Col C

deleteDialog.title: Delete this guideline?
deleteDialog.description: The guideline will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.

empty.title: No reviews yet
empty.description: Create the first review for a probationary employee.

toast.openExists: This employee already has an open review.

deliverables.title: Work evidence
deliverables.empty: No evidence yet. Log delivered work items to back up the review.

toast.titleRequired: Each evidence item needs a deliverable title.
toast.invalidLink: Evidence links must be valid http/https URLs.

scorecard.noCriteria: No active criteria. Ask HR to configure evaluation criteria first.

toast.incomplete: Please score all criteria before submitting.
toast.extendDate: Extending probation requires a future end date.

scorecard.selfNotSubmitted: The employee has not self-evaluated yet — you can still score and submit.

decide.title: HR decision
decide.subtitle: Choose the final outcome. Consequences apply immediately and cannot be undone.

failWarning.title: Confirm Fail?
failWarning.description: The employee will be terminated as soon as you confirm. This action cannot be undone.

cancelDialog.title: Cancel this review?
cancelDialog.description: The review will move to Cancelled and can no longer proceed.

toast.extendDate: Extending requires a future end date.
toast.notDecidable: This review is not awaiting HR.

criteria.title: Evaluation criteria
criteria.subtitle: The criteria used to score probation (scale 1–5).

empty.title: No criteria yet
empty.description: Add the first criteria to start scoring probation reviews.

form.name: Criteria name
form.rubricHint: Leave everything blank for no guide. If used, every level needs a label.

deleteDialog.title: Delete criteria?
deleteDialog.description: The criteria will be permanently deleted. If it has been used in a review, deactivate it instead.

toast.inUse: This criteria has been used in a review. Deactivate it instead of deleting.

self.title: Probation self-evaluation
self.subtitle: Step 1 of the review flow: score yourself against the criteria before your manager reviews.
self.instruction: Rate 1–5 on each criterion (press ⓘ for the level guide). You cannot edit after submitting.
self.submittedNotice: You have submitted your self-evaluation. Your manager and HR will reference it.
self.commentPlaceholder: What went well, challenges you faced, support you need… (optional)

empty.title: No open self-evaluation
empty.description: When your manager opens your probation review, you will be notified and can fill it in here.

confirmDialog.title: Submit self-evaluation?
confirmDialog.description: You cannot edit after submitting. Your manager and HR will see your self scores.

toast.incomplete: Please score every criterion before submitting.
toast.notEditable: Self-evaluation is locked (already submitted or the manager has finished).
